# Scope Management Plan

## Product Scope Description
An AI pipeline that classifies subsea imagery based on benthic relevance,
prioritizing precision and environmental confidence.

## Definition of Benthic-Relevant Data
Includes visible seabed, benthic organisms, and ecological structures (reefs,
sediment patterns, bioturbation).

## Explicit Exclusions
- Open water column
- Purely anthropogenic structures without biology
- Unusable data (severe turbidity, blur, extreme lighting)

## MVP Strategy
Filter Noise, Preserve Confidence.
Precision prioritized over recall; false negatives monitored as environmental
risk.

## Deliverables
- Binary classification model
- Preprocessing pipeline
- Annotation workflow
- Validation reports
- Versioned datasets

## Constraints
- No labeled dataset
- Class imbalance
- Environmental variability
- Offline-first requirement

## Assumptions
See Assumption Log.
